summary: Wrote Japanese notification_service progress report: short-tau det=1.0 MHz Ramsey completed safely but remains non-claim-grade for T2star/13C; targeted det=1.5 MHz short-tau Ramsey diagnostic is now running healthy at initial 1/12 status; no explicit bridge-free task is pending, with opportunity-review expected to derive science-objective work if needed.

notification_service_media.caption: short-tau Ramsey terminal review: non-claim-grade 1.192 MHz component and no supported T2star/13C yet
